description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: CI_Ubuntu and CI_Windows that run in parallel with different configurations, and Formatting. The CI_Ubuntu job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a novelrt-build image, checks out the code, and runs a CI build script. The CI_Windows job runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the code, runs a machine setup script, and then runs a CI build script. The Formatting job checks code formatting using clang-format-lint-action and uploads a patch if the check fails.
